text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, after having won many<n>races, Narita
Taishin drops by.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So, about that hot spring ticket...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Both Ticket and Hayahide are busy,<n>and I've got
no one else to go with<n>me, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... If you've got nothing better to<n>do...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here—it's time to use the<n>vacation ticket
we won at the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But first... I have to get through the<n>mountains of
paperwork that's piled<n>up over the course of the
Twinkle<n>Series!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I roll up my sleeves and bury myself<n>in work for
the next few days.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And that's everything! Thank you<n>very much.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um, you appear to be rather<n>exhausted. Make
sure to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to finish up all of my work,<n>and the next
day quickly rolls around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay. The schedule's fine with me,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you're okay to go on<n>vacation
looking like that? I feel like a<n>light breeze could
knock you over.
choice_data_list: I can wash my exhaustion away in the hot spring!
I can wash my exhaustion away in the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Meh. It's your funeral.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so we set off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who chooses such a decked out<n>place for the
prize of some shopping<n>raffle?
choice_data_list: I bet the hot spring will be amazing!
I bet the hot spring will be amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel much better after my bath. It<n>seems the long
soak really did take<n>away my exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My head feels a little light, but I'm<n>sure the
dizziness will fade soon<n>enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, did you just finish up too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure, it wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, your face is really red. Were<n>you in the hot
water for too long?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Snap out of it! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Finally, you're awake. Do you<n>remember getting
lightheaded and<n>passing out?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you even know what you're<n>apologizing for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If it's for ruining our trip or for<n>collapsing and
being a pain...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll kick you right back into the<n>hot spring.
Boil for all I care.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I talked with Tazuna earlier, and she<n>said you
were working like mad so<n>you could go on this
trip.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What am I supposed to do with you if<n>you pass
out from exhaustion?<n>Bonehead.
choice_data_list:
I thought this would be a good reward for all your
wins...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I think you might hold the<n>record for
being the biggest dummy in<n>the world.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin abruptly stretches her<n>hand towards
me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Poke! Jab!
choice_data_list: Ow, ow, ow! What are you doing?!
Ow, ow, ow! What are you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The staff taught me a pressure point<n>to get rid of
dizziness from heat<n>exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Now stay there, and don't move!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her jabs are too much, and I shuffle<n>away from
the painful prodding. I<n>manage to escape her for a
moment,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop trying to get away.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Those teary eyes won't stop me. I'm<n>not here to
be nice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Save. Your. Breath!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I hope you learned your lesson now.<n>Don't push
yourself for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're the only person who's crazy<n>enough to
put up with me and be my<n>trainer, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't know what I'd do without<n>you.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure there are plenty of people lining up to be
your trainer now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! That's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Get it through your thick head—you're<n>the only
trainer for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You'd better get what I'm saying<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Narita Taishin and I have<n>formed an
irreplaceable bond during<n>our trip.
